meaning: (教)贝叶斯定理的,贝叶斯判决规则的
examples: Bayesian techniques built on a word model work rather well.
Unlike earlier studies, Gregory used a branch of statistics called Bayesian analysis.
Others use Bayesian combinations of individual words that statistically make up spam messages.
But because of their philosophical training in the rigours of Pascal's method, the Bayesian bolt-on does not come easily to scientists.
